risk_if_not_implemented: Without Embedded Technology Maintenance, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Maintenance Operations
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to develop, disseminate, review & update procedures to facilitate the implementation of maintenance controls across the enterprise.
compensating_control_1.justification: Maintenance Operations (MNT-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Embedded Technology Maintenance (EMB-07) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Configuration Management Program
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of configuration management controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Configuration Management Program (CFG-01) provides policy-level governance that compensates for the absence of Embedded Technology Maintenance (EMB-07) by establishing documented expectations, accountability structures, and organizational guardrails. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
